mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS LOGIN_CNT FROM MST.TB_USER_OTP_HIST WHERE SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SLOGIN_DT = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') AND SSUCCES_YN = 'Y'
SELECT EMP_NO, REPLACE(HANDPHONE_NO,'-','') AS handphone_no FROM BIF.TB_IDMSUSER WHERE EMP_NO = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE MST.TB_USER_OTP_API_HIST SET STRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionid, jdbcType=OTHER}, SSEQUENCE_NO = #{sequenceno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SRETURN_CODE = #{returncode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SRETURN_DESC = #{returndescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SRETURN_ERROR_CODE = #{errorcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SRETURN_ERROR_DESC = #{errordescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DMODIFY_DT = SYSDATE, SMODIFY_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE NAPI_HIST_MST_SEQ = #{apiHistSeq,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sfail_cnt)+1,0) AS checkcount FROM MST.TB_USER_OTP_HIST WHERE SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SLOGIN_DT = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST.TB_USER_OTP_HIST ( SUSER_ID, SLOGIN_DT, SSUCCES_YN, SFAIL_CNT, DCREATE_DT, SCREATE_ID, DMODIFY_DT, SMODIFY_ID )VALUES( #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{ssuccessYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sfailCnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT pk_tb_user_otp_hist DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE MST.TB_USER_OTP_HIST SET SSUCCES_YN = #{ssuccessYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SFAIL_CNT = #{sfailCnt, jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SLOGIN_DT = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD')
